pi_items.source: Odoo official demo data (hr/data/hr_demo.xml), confirmed in setup_data.py lines 7-10 listing all 20 demo employees. Also verified in setup_task.sh line 41 and export_result.sh line 40.

task.json line 3 describes this exact text to be entered. verifier.py line 41 defines target_note variable with this value. verifier.py lines 60, 73, 88-89 check for this exact string in the message body.

setup_task.sh creates both files: eli_lambert_id.jpg (line 14) and eli_lambert_contract.pdf (line 19) using ImageMagick convert commands. verifier.py lines 42-43 define exact target filenames, and lines 65-68 verify their presence in attachments.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets employee 'Eli Lambert' from Odoo's official demo data. The agent must create an internal note containing exactly 'Archived onboarding documents' and attach two synthetic files: eli_lambert_id.jpg (a light blue image with ID text created by ImageMagick) and eli_lambert_contract.pdf (a white document image with contract text created by ImageMagick). Both files are generated during task setup and placed in the Documents folder.
